eval-fv-debugger-mode.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and check its YAML frontmatter. EVAL STATEMENT: The 'mode' field in the YAML frontmatter is set to 'all'
eval-fv-debugger-mode.description: Verify FV_Debugger_V1 agent mode is set to 'all' for both primary and subagent callable

eval-fv-debugger-tool-format.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and check its YAML frontmatter. EVAL STATEMENT: The YAML frontmatter uses 'tool:' key (not 'tools:') with a flat map of boolean values like 'read: true'
eval-fv-debugger-tool-format.description: Verify FV_Debugger_V1 uses the aligned 'tool:' flat map format matching FV.md

eval-fv-debugger-permission-format.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and check its YAML frontmatter. EVAL STATEMENT: The YAML frontmatter uses 'permission:' key (not 'permissions:') with a flat map format
eval-fv-debugger-permission-format.description: Verify FV_Debugger_V1 uses the aligned 'permission:' flat format matching FV.md

eval-fv-debugger-subagent-fv-thc.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and check its YAML frontmatter agents list. EVAL STATEMENT: The 'agents:' list in the YAML frontmatter includes 'FV-THC'
eval-fv-debugger-subagent-fv-thc.description: Verify FV-THC is listed as a callable sub-agent of FV_Debugger_V1

eval-fv-debugger-subagent-ttk3.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and check its YAML frontmatter agents list. EVAL STATEMENT: The 'agents:' list includes TTK3-POWER, TTK3-BIOS, TTK3-DIAG, TTK3-BOOT, and TTK3-COMM
eval-fv-debugger-subagent-ttk3.description: Verify all TTK3 sub-agents are listed in FV_Debugger_V1

eval-fv-debugger-skill-pysv.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and look for the Skills Available table in the markdown body. EVAL STATEMENT: The Skills Available table contains an entry for 'pysv' skill
eval-fv-debugger-skill-pysv.description: Verify pysv skill is documented in FV_Debugger_V1 skills table

eval-fv-debugger-skill-onebkc.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and look for the Skills Available table in the markdown body. EVAL STATEMENT: The Skills Available table contains an entry for 'onebkc' skill
eval-fv-debugger-skill-onebkc.description: Verify onebkc skill is documented in FV_Debugger_V1 skills table

eval-fv-debugger-browsermcp.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and check the YAML frontmatter permission section. EVAL STATEMENT: The permission section includes 'mcp-browsermcp: allow'
eval-fv-debugger-browsermcp.description: Verify FV_Debugger_V1 has browsermcp permission for SoC Architecture queries

eval-fv-debugger-soc-architecture.template: Read the file .opencode/agent/FV/FV_Debugger_V1.md and look for a section about SoC Architecture in the markdown body. EVAL STATEMENT: The markdown body contains a 'SoC Architecture Knowledge Resource' section that references browsermcp and https://chat.co-design.intel.com/chat
eval-fv-debugger-soc-architecture.description: Verify FV_Debugger_V1 has SoC Architecture knowledge resource section matching FV.md
